user.title: ArrowHead Alarm System Setup
user.description: Choose how your alarm panel is connected

data_description.connectiontype: Choose 'ip' for network connection or 'serial' for direct serial connection

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure ArrowHead Alarm System
reconfigure.description: Update your alarm system connection and device configuration. Existing areas, zones, and outputs will be preserved unless you choose to reconfigure them.

data_description.connectiontype: Choose 'ip' for network connection or 'serial' for direct serial connection

ip_connection.title: IP Connection Setup
ip_connection.description: Configure the network connection to your alarm panel

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the AAP alarm panel
data_description.keepalive_interval: How often to send keep-alive packets (minimum 15 seconds)
data_description.timeout: How long to wait for connection before timing out
data_description.message_log_enabled: When enabled, a sensor entity will track the last 5 raw messages received from the alarm panel

serial_connection.title: Serial Connection Setup
serial_connection.description: Configure the serial connection to your alarm panel

data_description.keepalive_interval: How often to send keep-alive packets (minimum 15 seconds)
data_description.timeout: How long to wait for connection before timing out
data_description.message_log_enabled: When enabled, a sensor entity will track the last 5 raw messages received from the alarm panel

zones.title: Configure Zones
zones.description: Zones represent door/window sensors and other detection devices

data_description.zone_number: The zone number from your alarm panel (1-32)
data_description.zone_name: Friendly name for this zone (e.g., 'Front Door', 'Living Room Window')
data_description.zone_type: Type of sensor/device connected to this zone

areas.title: Configure Areas
areas.description: Areas represent different alarm zones/partitions in your system

data_description.area_number: The area number from your alarm panel (1-2)
data_description.area_code: Security code for this area (leave blank to use default)
data_description.code_arm_required: Whether a security code is required to arm this area
data_description.code_panic_required: Whether a security code is required to trigger panic for this area

outputs.title: Configure Outputs
outputs.description: Outputs control devices like sirens, lights, or other controllable devices

data_description.output_number: The output number from your alarm panel (1-32)
data_description.output_name: Friendly name for this output (e.g., 'Siren', 'Garage Light')

error.connection_timeout: Connection timed out. Please check your network settings and try again.
error.connection_error: Failed to connect to the alarm system. Please verify the settings and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to alarm system. Please check the host and port are correct.
error.invalid_serial_port: Invalid serial port path. Expected format: /dev/ttyUSB0, /dev/ttyACM0, or COM1
error.zone_number: Zone number already exists. Please choose a different number.
error.area_number: Area number already exists. Please choose a different number.
error.output_number: Output number already exists. Please choose a different number.

abort.already_configured: This alarm panel connection is already configured.

init.title: AAP Alarm Options
init.description: Configure advanced options for your AAP alarm system
